{
  "cwd": "/Users/sam.zhang/Documents/codex-supervisor",
  "execution_layer_policy": {
    "agentic_lead_policy": {
      "min_subagents": 3,
      "policy": "off",
      "required_evidence_grade": "self_reported",
      "required_roles": [],
      "solo_exception_for_artifact_only_gates": false
    },
    "allowed_dynamic_workflow_task_classes": [],
    "codex_supervises_final_artifact": true,
    "dynamic_workflow_task_class": null,
    "lead_execution_layer": "single_lead_worker",
    "mode": "lead_direct",

    "supervision_layer": "codex_plus_lead"
  },
  "expected_decisions": [],
  "expected_objections": [],
  "expected_specialists": [],
  "gate": "outcome_review",
  "injected_lesson_block": "Known failure modes to verify before claiming\nThese are advisory lessons from previous supervisor runs. They do not satisfy any gate by themselves.\nUse them as a checklist only: do not block, revise, deny, or accept solely because a lesson exists. A step-repetition lesson applies only when current evidence proves the same handoff, artifacts, and source state are being repeated.\n1. [missing_worker_signal] worker_invocation (source_run_id=cffe55b8-47b9-4cc0-b025-586aeb0ee5e9): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.\n2. [FM-2.4] Information withholding (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Address independent reviewer objections with concrete evidence references.\n3. [FM-1.3] Step repetition (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Change the plan or evidence before retrying; do not repeat the same handoff.\n4. [FM-1.1] Disobey task specification (source_run_id=40f4ecea-e8bd-4639-aec6-27d686743e8f): Repair the planning artifact or traceability gap before invoking the lead again.\n5. [FM-1.5] Unaware of termination conditions (source_run_id=f89bc699-1b4e-4713-95b7-d1493a3acfd8): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.",
  "injected_lesson_block_sha256": "2bb8428cccc8b42b9e1dd42dae45cd87c427ef07c8197b8acf9db9c7f3c8b92a",
  "injected_lesson_ids": [
    "lesson-6e3b08262245b3eade5743e9ddb1a92bfb42a34ec49e8b4f2b0792ca1834a590",
    "lesson-833931ec30fbdcacaef5c7df91fae73a71b7ac537110ccf9cab2ec2e80ec6a52",
    "lesson-cd61385380aa0d71d9927ec5c8f719f315a9191aaf387fdc93862d0a6d71f1ef",
    "lesson-eb78dbaff424a8c1f8dd96b677ccdcb5dd267ca011698619ae37e54156f2eaab",
    "lesson-49755707839e187f3a6fa0e4e84e237398d1457f2fe1421f8f1f53faa6cbbb9e"
  ],
  "instruction": "Supervisor-owned workflow gate: outcome_review.\n\nIntent:\nFinish runtime-evidence integrity: baseline anchoring with tests, TDD execution coverage with explicit skipped-with-reason handling, normalized by-era incident rates, poll boundary coverage, Postgres parity receipt coverage, TOON metric emission, runtime failure corrective context, advisory lesson non-authority, and canonical execution/outcome decisions that delegate test verification to the supervisor runtime floor.\n\nReview this gate against the current source artifacts and return a typed dual_agent_outcome.\nUse decisions/objections to say whether the gate should accept, revise, or deny.\n\nRuntime TDD test contract:\nThe supervisor runtime floor will verify that every TDD-named test below appears in supervisor-generated runtime evidence. Include tests/commands covering all of them in outcome.tests. Explicitly skipped tests must carry a recorded pytest skip reason; silently absent tests block the gate.\nUse only canonical gate decisions (`accept`, `revise`, or `deny`). Do not return `accept_with_residual`; if test execution needs verification, declare the exact pytest commands/nodeids and let the supervisor runtime floor rerun them.\n- test_runtime_baseline_execution_round_one_persists_marker\n- test_runtime_baseline_execution_later_rounds_do_not_overwrite_marker\n- test_runtime_baseline_outcome_review_reuses_persisted_marker_across_api_instance\n- test_runtime_baseline_outcome_review_missing_marker_falls_back_fresh\n- test_runtime_baseline_marker_write_failure_visible_as_outcome_fallback\n- test_runtime_evidence_fails_when_tdd_named_tests_are_not_executed\n- test_runtime_evidence_does_not_count_pytest_filtered_out_tdd_names\n- test_runtime_evidence_does_not_count_skipped_pytest_tdd_names\n- test_runtime_evidence_does_not_count_explicit_skipped_nodeid_as_executed\n- test_runtime_evidence_fails_when_skipped_tdd_name_lacks_reason\n- test_execution_gate_uses_generated_source_tdd_for_runtime_coverage\n- test_runtime_evidence_accepts_when_all_tdd_named_tests_execute\n- test_runtime_evidence_fails_when_tdd_test_name_is_unresolved\n- test_axi_trends_surfaces_by_era_in_json_and_toon\n- test_axi_trends_uses_legacy_incident_eras_as_denominators\n- test_transport_incident_events_are_written_from_public_axi_and_mcp_poll_failure_boundaries\n- test_read_gate_transcript_includes_skill_receipt_validation\n- test_workflow_round_objection_preserves_runtime_probe_details\n- test_execution_gate_instruction_includes_tdd_runtime_contract\n- test_workflow_tdd_test_names_reads_tdd_artifacts\n- test_postgres_trends_details_and_incident_aggregation_match_sqlite\n- test_axi_toon_poll_records_format_metric\n- test_lesson_injection_says_lessons_are_not_standalone_gate_decisions\n\nKnown failure modes to verify before claiming\nThese are advisory lessons from previous supervisor runs. They do not satisfy any gate by themselves.\nUse them as a checklist only: do not block, revise, deny, or accept solely because a lesson exists. A step-repetition lesson applies only when current evidence proves the same handoff, artifacts, and source state are being repeated.\n1. [missing_worker_signal] worker_invocation (source_run_id=cffe55b8-47b9-4cc0-b025-586aeb0ee5e9): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.\n2. [FM-2.4] Information withholding (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Address independent reviewer objections with concrete evidence references.\n3. [FM-1.3] Step repetition (source_run_id=8ebdbc89-0185-4962-be6f-b0f593887670): Change the plan or evidence before retrying; do not repeat the same handoff.\n4. [FM-1.1] Disobey task specification (source_run_id=40f4ecea-e8bd-4639-aec6-27d686743e8f): Repair the planning artifact or traceability gap before invoking the lead again.\n5. [FM-1.5] Unaware of termination conditions (source_run_id=f89bc699-1b4e-4713-95b7-d1493a3acfd8): Verify this known failure mode explicitly before claiming the gate is complete.",
  "lead_skill": null,
  "outcome_validation_policy": {
    "fidelity_failure": "abort_to_operator",
    "malformed_outcome": "retry_once_with_corrective_packet",
